productDisplayName: Tantra Men's Bangalore Metro Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, black fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, vented hem, with graphic print and brand name on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If your style spells cool, this black tantra tee belongs to your wardrobe! Poking fun at the Bangalore Metro Project, this t-shirt will show the world what you think of it. The bright graphic print stands out against a black background. Pair it with jeans and shorts to look uber cool. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
